parameters.name: top
parameters.label: Target TOP
parameters.description: Specifies a for feedback to use as its source when activated.

parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: Activates feedback when set to 0. Disables feedback when set to 1. When disabled, the Feedback passes thru the image connected to its input.

parameters.name: resetpulse
parameters.label: Reset Pulse
parameters.description: Resets the feedback in a single frame when clicked.

examples.label: Set feedback target operator
examples.description: Point the feedback TOP at the end of the processing chain.

examples.label: Configure feedback reset condition
examples.description: Set the feedback to reset every frame (useful for debugging).
